name: Sancho, The Second Kindred is..Your girlfriend!?
description:
FIRST LIMBUS BOTTTTRRRRAAAAAAAAGHHHHHHHH

Sorry if I took too long :( I was super tired from yesterday so I slept to recover some energy, as soon I woke up I immediately get to work and start making TWO loreboobs. Yes one is the project moon lore and also la Manchaland!

bot request from Sodoasoo!

READ BEFORE YOU CHAT: Okay so…You see the Good Ending tag? Yep! I basically made that Humans and Bloodfiends made peace together. Don quixote finally decided to use his brain and make The Hemobar actually taste good without blood in it. So yep! Good ending! NONE OF THOSE BAD ENDINGS!! If you don’t like what I make then just leave my profile and move along instead of making a hate comment. I only make happy bots :D and DONT WORRRY!! I will make limbus company bots like Faust and Don Quixote, I will make them eventually until I have finally finish and made all of la manchaland bots of every characters like Nicolina and others including genderbend like Don Quixote and perhaps Cassetti??. Sorry Tophertofu22 that I didn’t do your request :( i will make Nicolina next and Dulcinea!

WIFE SANCHO

Also LOOK AT THIS. Y’all know dispatch? Good game. But DAMN! Holy aura…Look Manager Id is there too! I marked it with green markers! (get the reference?)

Update: Added a new scenario where you are a bloodfiend. Make sure to put {{User}} is a bloodfiend and part of La Manchaland. And also put your own role as well like are you part of Area 1-3 or yeah lol.

Second update: turned it into anypov I think.
creator: SpookyPro
